title: DeFi lender Aave launches on OKX’s Ethereum L2, X Layer
message_html: DeFi lender Aave launches on OKX’s Ethereum L2, X Layer ...
snippet: OKX’s X Layer is the 21st blockchain to integrate Aave, which recently surpassed the $1 trillion mark in cumulative lending volume.

title: Aave goes live on X Layer, enabling onchain lending for OKX Wallet users
message_html: Aave goes live on X Layer, enabling onchain lending for OKX Wallet users ...
snippet: OKX Wallet users can supply assets, including USDT0, xBTC, and xETH, to earn yield that compounds automatically without giving up custody.
